items.definition_en: A tuxedo is a formal suit worn by men for special occasions.
items.example_en: He wore a black tuxedo to the wedding.

items.definition_en: A bow tie is a special kind of tie shaped like a bow.
items.example_en: He learned how to tie a bow tie for the party.

items.definition_en: A dress shirt is a formal shirt usually worn with a suit.
items.example_en: He ironed his white dress shirt for the meeting.

items.definition_en: A tie is a long piece of cloth worn around the neck for formal occasions.
items.example_en: He picked a blue tie to match his suit.

items.definition_en: A dress is a piece of clothing worn by women or girls that covers the body and part of the legs.
items.example_en: She wore a red dress to the dinner.

items.definition_en: A skirt suit is a formal outfit with a jacket and matching skirt.
items.example_en: She bought a navy skirt suit for work.

items.definition_en: A waistcoat is a formal vest worn over a shirt and under a suit jacket.
items.example_en: The groom wore a grey waistcoat with his suit.

items.definition_en: A cummerbund is a wide sash worn around the waist with a tuxedo.
items.example_en: He put on a black cummerbund for the ceremony.

items.definition_en: An evening gown is a long, formal dress for special events.
items.example_en: She wore a sparkling evening gown to the gala.

items.definition_en: A cocktail dress is a smart dress worn for parties or formal events.
items.example_en: She chose a blue cocktail dress for the party.

items.definition_en: A suit is a set of matching jacket and pants worn for formal occasions.
items.example_en: He put on a new suit for his job interview.

items.definition_en: A blouse is a light, loose shirt for women.
items.example_en: She wore a white blouse with her skirt.

items.definition_en: Dress pants are formal trousers worn for special occasions or work.
items.example_en: He needs new dress pants for the office.

items.definition_en: A gown is a long dress for women, often worn for parties or ceremonies.
items.example_en: The bride's gown was very beautiful.

items.definition_en: A necktie is a formal piece of clothing worn around the neck with a shirt.
items.example_en: He wore a red necktie with his white shirt.

items.definition_en: A tailcoat is a formal jacket with long tails at the back.
items.example_en: He wore a black tailcoat to the formal dance.

items.definition_en: A shawl is a large piece of cloth worn around the shoulders.
items.example_en: She put on a shawl over her dress.

items.definition_en: A tuxedo shirt is a formal shirt worn with a tuxedo.
items.example_en: He bought a new tuxedo shirt for the ball.

items.definition_en: Dress shoes are formal shoes worn with suits.
items.example_en: He polished his dress shoes before the event.

items.definition_en: A sash is a long piece of cloth worn around the waist or shoulder.
items.example_en: She wore a red sash with her evening dress.
